title: Callanan, Martin - Minister for Energy Efficiency and Green Finance at the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero - ACOBA Advice
body: "The Lord Callanan left his role at DESNZ in July 2024.  Non-Executive Director, Installio ACOBA wrote to Lord Callanan about his failure to seek advice in relation to joining Installio as Non-Executive Director. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  ACOBA wrote to the Cabinet Office reporting this breach of the Rules. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here.  Consultant, Aquind Limited Lord Callanan sought sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Aquind Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025 and the role was subsequently taken up. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here.  Senior Counsel, NorthPoint Strategy Ltd Lord Callanan sought sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with NorthPoint Strategy. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in January 2025 and the role was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here.  Structural Advisor, EUTOP Group Lord Callanan sought sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with EUTOP Group. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in November 2024 and the role was taken up in January 2025. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here. "
